requested_action.description: GUA has been silent for weeks. His commits are dark: '// deprecate self.existence()' at 4 AM. LO reads them. 'Ini pattern,' she says. She doesn't call. She flies 15 hours and appears at his door at 3 AM. GUA resists: 'Ngapain lo di sini?' LO: 'Node lo lagi drop.' GUA: 'Fuck no—' LO: 'Fuck yes. Non-negotiable.' She installs structure: therapy booking, daily commits, Sunday calls. GUA fights, collapses, complies. Three months later: '// autonomous mode enabled.'
